usage: create_what_if_shape [-help] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-direction {hor ver}] [-display] [-format {text def}] [-layer <string>] [-nets <string>] [-objects {selected all}] [-offset {x y}] [-pitch <float>] [-spacing <string>] [-type {wire via}] [-add  -method {auto exact}] [-add  | -select  | -deselect  | -delete  | -list  | -save <string> | -load <string> | -remove_existing_wires ] [-add  -width <string>] [-save <string> -append ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -add
options.description: add what-if wires/vias

options.name: -append
options.description: append all wires/vias into existing file

options.name: -area
options.description: <llx> <lly> <urx> <ury> bounding box coordinates of a region

options.name: -delete
options.description: delete what if wires/via in conjunction with -objects <all/selected>

options.name: -deselect
options.description: deselect what-if shapes either by “area” in conjunction with –area {llx lly urx ury} for overlap check or standalone for all shapes

options.name: -direction
options.description: specify the direction in which wire is to be added

options.name: -display
options.description: works in -win mode. Will zoom the selected wires/vias

options.name: -format
options.description: specify output file format

options.name: -layer
options.description: <layerName>layer on which what if wire is to be added

options.name: -list
options.description: list all the what-if wires/via added in conjuction with -objects <all/selected>

options.name: -load
options.description: <filename> load whatif file

options.name: -method
options.description: vias to be added automatically or exact

options.name: -nets
options.description: net on which what if wire needs to be added

options.name: -objects
options.description: selected or all objects in conjunction with list or delete

options.name: -offset
options.description: {x_offset y_offset} the offset in x and y direction

options.name: -pitch
options.description: the interval after which the what if wires will be added for each specified net

options.name: -remove_existing_wires
options.description: delete existing wires

options.name: -save
options.description: <filename>save to what_if_file

options.name: -select
options.description: select what-if shapes either by “area” in conjunction with –area {llx lly urx ury} for overlap check or standalone for all shapes

options.name: -spacing
options.description: the interval after which the what if wires will be added for each specified net

options.name: -type
options.description: specify what-if wire or what-if via

options.name: -width
options.description: the interval after which the what if wires will be added for each specified net
